requirement_text: Define and maintain security architecture and trust boundaries
rationale: CVE-2021-22986 analysis needs explicit boundaries between fixture and services.

requirement_text: Inventory and verify platform component versions
rationale: Toolchain drift can invalidate reproducibility of security evidence.

requirement_text: Verify authentication controls and session handling
rationale: CVE chain includes token extraction and auth bypass patterns.

requirement_text: Enforce authorization decisions before protected actions
rationale: SSRF allowlist should run before trace processing.

requirement_text: Validate and constrain OS-command style input
Use strong transport and cryptographic controls
rationale: Replay and fixture transport boundaries must be explicit.
Research outputs require tamper-evident evidence storage.

requirement_text: Restrict outbound requests to trusted destinations
rationale: Trace replay must only target localhost fixture.
Fixture mode and localhost binding are mandatory hardening controls.
